subcodes.first_line: O beloved and kindly friend! [3.5s]... ...In your letter to my brother, Mirza Badi'u'llah, you promised to write us soon a detailed letter. We have waited long and it has not come
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار عزیز مهربان در رقمیکه به برادر میرزا بدیع الله مرقوم فرموده بودید وعده
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
